DARES.text: Do 20 pushups right now. Fail = drink 5.
Call your mom and tell her you love her. No context.
Sing 30 seconds of whatever song the group picks.
Swap shirts with the person to your left for the next 3 cards.
Show everyone your most recent photo. No scrolling.
Give your phone to the player on your right for 30 seconds. They can post anything.
Dance alone for 20 seconds while everyone watches in silence.
Do an impression of someone in the room. They have to guess who.
Send an eggplant emoji to the last person you texted.
Talk in rhymes for the next minute. Fail = drink 3.
Drink with your non-dominant hand for the rest of the game.
Imitate an animal until someone guesses it.
Give the groom a 30-second motivational speech about marriage.
Read the last message in your ex chat out loud.
Let the group pick a new wallpaper for your phone. It stays all night.
Speak in an accent of the group's choice for 3 minutes.
Call a random contact and say 'I know what you did'. Hang up.
Let the group read your most recent DMs with anyone you've dated.
Do your best sex noises. Loud. For 10 seconds.
Give a toast to the groom in a language you don't speak.
Post a story: 'I'm finally coming out'. Leave it up 10 minutes.
Text your ex 'I still think about you' and show us the reply.
Take a shot with no hands. Spill = drink another.
Give the groom a lap dance. At least 15 seconds.
Recite the alphabet backwards. Mess up = drink 3.
Down your drink right now. Go.
Do a headstand or drink 5.
Pick two players. They have to try to kiss — you decide if it happens.
Confess one genuine thing you've never told the person to your right.
Call your boss and tell them they're doing a great job. Leave the voicemail.
Let the group change your Instagram bio for 24 hours.
Do the worm across the floor.
Tell the darkest joke you know. Silence = drink 5.
Hold a plank until the next card is drawn.
Take off one item of clothing. Any item.
Eat or drink something nobody else has touched in the room.
Let the group see your search history for today.
Air guitar solo. Full commitment. 20 seconds minimum.
Confess your weirdest turn-on to the room.
Read the last thing the groom texted his fiancee. Out loud.
Text your work group chat something unhinged.
Kiss the person to your left on the forehead.
Let another player style your hair however they want for the rest of the game.
Do your best striptease for 10 seconds. Music optional.
Prank call a restaurant: reserve a table for Jesus Christ, party of 12.
Give a 30-second TED talk on why you're single (or why you shouldn't be).
Tell the worst pickup line you've ever used and the result.
Stand on a chair and yell 'I AM A GROWN MAN' for the room.
Ask the next stranger you see for a high-five. Refused = drink 5.

HOT_TAKES: Marriage is just legalized cohabitation with extra steps
Monogamy is a scam invented by people who ran out of charisma
Bachelor parties should be mandatory before every wedding
A man who cries at his own wedding is a better husband than one who doesn't
Wedding rings are glorified friendship bracelets
Your best man should always have a worse past than you
If you've never thought about cheating you're not paying attention
Sober people at weddings are the real villains
Every engagement longer than a year is a breakup in slow motion
Prenups are the biggest flex in modern love
Wedding speeches only work if somebody gets mildly roasted
The bride always knows about the bachelor party and pretends she doesn't
Men don't mature, they just run out of energy
Your first love is always your biggest 'what if'
A man without weird friends is a suspicious man
Alcohol is cheaper than therapy and works faster
Every happy marriage is just two people who gave up at the same time
The first year of marriage is a beta test
Women always know within a week if they'll marry you
Men who say 'happy wife happy life' are lying to themselves
Having kids kills marriages more than cheating does
If your ex is at your wedding, the marriage is already doomed
People only say 'we're soulmates' when the sex is still good
You should be required to live together for 2 years before marrying
The wedding photographer sees more drama than any priest
CATEGORIES: Ways to ruin a first date
Things your mom would slap you for
Songs you cry to in secret
Stupid things to spend money on
Things you've said but never meant
RULE_EXAMPLES: Every time someone says the groom's name, everyone drinks 1
No pointing with fingers — break it, drink 2
No saying 'I' or 'me' — break it, drink 1
Every phone ring = phone owner drinks 2
No saying the word 'drink' — break it, drink 2
Every time someone swears, they drink 1
No first names — nicknames only. Break it, drink 2
Every time someone says 'ex', everyone drinks
Anyone going to the bathroom takes a partner — solo = drink 3
First person to laugh at any card drinks 2
Whenever someone says 'why', they drink
No elbows on the table — break it, drink 1
No saying 'yes' or 'no'
Everyone has a secret nickname. Use a real name = drink 3
If you spill your drink, drink 3 more
Every time you check your phone, drink 1
The groom chooses the rule for the next round
No pointing at the groom — ever
If you laugh during the groom's turn, drink 2
Every time someone says 'bro', everyone says 'bro' — last person drinks

GROOM_SPECIALS.text: Groom — tell us the last genuinely honest thing you thought about your fiancee
Groom — sing a song that reminds you of her. Loud.
Groom — confess one thing you've been hiding from her
Groom — give us 3 marriage tips you never followed yourself
Groom — show us the oldest picture of you two
Groom — text her 'I love you' right now and show us her reply
Groom — describe your first kiss in 3 words
Groom — what's the one word she calls you when you fight?
Groom — name one thing about her that still surprises you
Groom — toast to your fiancee. Down your drink.
Groom — toast to these guys. No them, no tonight. Down it.
Groom — confess one thing you're scared to say at the wedding
Groom — 25 pushups. Right now.
Groom — name three things you'll stop doing after the wedding
Groom — pick one 'never again' and promise it in front of everyone
Groom — describe the first time you saw her naked in 5 words
Groom — what's the most embarrassing thing she knows about you?
Groom — if you could delete one memory with her, which one?
Groom — call her right now on speaker and tell her you're safe
Groom — what's the one thing about tonight she can never find out?
Groom — who here would you trust to raise your future kid?
Groom — your last meal as a single man. What is it?
Groom — one word to describe each of your friends. Go.
Groom — predict your marriage on a scale of 1-10. Explain.
Groom — name the exact moment you decided you'd propose
Groom — sing your fiancee's favorite song. Bonus drink if you nail a chorus.
Groom — imitate how she laughs
Groom — down whatever's in front of you. Now.
Groom — who was the one that got away?
Groom — pick the friend most likely to ruin your marriage
Groom — reveal one DM you never showed anyone
Groom — what's the first thing you'll do when you wake up married?
Groom — tell us the dumbest fight you two ever had
Groom — shot. Now. In her honor.
Groom — confess one bad habit she still doesn't know about
Groom — ten pushups for every year you've known her
Groom — what's the corniest thing you've ever done for her?
Groom — pour a shot for the friend who's helped you the most. Both drink.

CHAOS_CARDS.text: WATERFALL! Groom starts drinking. Everyone follows. Nobody stops until the person next to them stops. Groom stops last.
CATEGORIES! Groom picks a category. Go around the room. Freeze or repeat = drink 3.
THUMB MASTER! First person to notice the groom put his thumb on the table becomes Thumb Master. Last to follow drinks 2.
LITTLE MAN! Everyone has an invisible little man on their drink. Take him off, drink, put him back. Forget = shot.
KING GROOM! For the next 5 minutes everyone addresses the groom as 'Your Majesty'. Forget = drink 2.
RHYME TIME! Groom says a word. Everyone rhymes in order. Break it = drink 3.
POINT UP! Everyone throws a finger in the air NOW. Last one drinks 3.
HANDS ON HEAD! Right now. Last one drinks 3.
60 SECONDS OF SILENCE! Next 60 seconds — nobody talks. First to break = shot.
EYE CONTACT DUEL! Pair up. First to blink drinks 2.
DOUBLE OR NOTHING! The next card counts double. Double drinks. Double regrets.
SOCIAL! Everyone drinks 2 for the groom.
CHEERS TO THE GROOM! Everyone raises a glass and downs it.
LEFT HAND ONLY! For the next 10 minutes everyone drinks with their left hand. Forget = drink 3.
NO SWEARING NO 'I'! For 3 minutes. Every slip = sip.
YOUNGEST DRINKS 2!
OLDEST DRINKS 2!
SWITCH SEATS! Swap with the person across from you. Old seat drinks 2.
LAST SYLLABLE! For 2 minutes every sentence rhymes with the last word of the previous one. Fail = drink 3.
PICK A VICTIM! Choose any player — they drink your next penalty.
DESIGNATED DRINKER! Choose a friend — they take all your drinks for the next 2 cards.
GROOM EX'S! Groom downs his whole drink. NOW.
REVERSE! For the next 3 cards, whoever SHOULD drink doesn't. The one who drew the card drinks instead.
TRUTH OR TWO SHOTS! Groom answers one brutal question from each player, OR takes two shots.
HEAVEN & HELL! Each player picks someone — 'heaven' targets drink 2, 'hell' targets drink 3.
QUICKDRAW! Groom yells 'draw!' — last one to grab their drink downs it.
WHISPER A SIN! Each player whispers something embarrassing in the groom's ear. For every one he laughs at — everyone drinks.
TRUTH TRAIN! Everyone answers the same question the groom asks. Refuse = drink 3.
BEST MAN'S TAX! The best man drinks for the groom on the next 2 cards.
SILENT CHEERS! Everyone drinks. No talking for 30 seconds after.
NAME THAT SHOT! The groom names a shot type. Everyone takes one or drinks 5.
GROOM'S JURY! Vote: was the groom's last girlfriend hotter than his fiancee? Losing side drinks 3.
TIME MACHINE! Groom predicts what he'll be doing in 10 years. Anyone who doesn't believe him drinks 2.
